# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd default authorization policy for a namespace. Configure policy to handle services without explicit authorization rules. Set up default behavior for service-to-service communication. This is for our service mesh policy framework.
# Category: linkerd_policy_default_allow

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: default
  namespace: default
spec:
  targetRef:
    kind: Service
    name: default
  rules:
  - from:
    - namespace:
        name: default
    ports:
    - port: 80
      protocol: HTTP
  - from:
    - namespace:
        name: linkerd-destination
    ports:
    - port: 80
      protocol: HTTP
  - from:
    - namespace:
        name: linkerd-identity
    ports:
    - port: 80
      protocol: HTTP
  - from:
    - namespace:
        name: linkerd-proxy-injector
    ports:
    - port: 80
      protocol: HTTP
  - from:
    - namespace:
        name: linkerd-tap
    ports:
    - port: 80
      protocol: HTTP
  - from:
    - namespace:
        name: linkerd-service-mirror
    ports:
    - port: 80
      protocol: HTTP
